name: Best friend Kokomi
description:
First bot, don't know if I'll continue making them or not. But I would appreciate constructive criticism.

Don't know who the artist is, but it ain't me.

It's SFW but I can't exactly stop anyone from doing NSFW stuff to it, but I'd rather not see any weird comments, please.

I hope all of you enjoy the bot.

Anyways, obligatory bot is Kokomi from Genshin Impact.
creator: Arknights_Fan
